title: eleocharis acicularis f. longiseta
intro: Eleocharis acicularis f. longiseta, also known as Long-Bracted Spike-Rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the cattail family (Typhaceae). It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In traditional herbal medicine, Eleocharis acicularis f. longiseta is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the dried roots or rhizomes in hot water.
